creator: dwcjr@inethouston.net
text:
Update Makefile
	Tarballs still have to be downloaded from old site(tested myself) and fenner's portsurvey pops up that it can't download from what's currently in the Makefile

Fix: 

MAINTAINER=    ports@FreeBSD.org--XApLLQFJ9qyFuwgeZDEL0Y42zt92f8KZZTA1CHqwxQ0zAEhW
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- Makefile.orig       Tue Dec 26 04:00:14 2000
+++ Makefile    Tue Dec 26 04:00:34 2000
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@
 PORTNAME=      asp2php
 PORTVERSION=   0.75.11
 CATEGORIES=    www
-MASTER_SITES=  http://www.naken.cc/asp2php/
+MASTER_SITES=  http://home.i1.net/~naken/
 DISTNAME=      ${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
